Reference Indexer

Upload your final paper (.docx). We read your references and prepare the CumInCAD index for you to review and confirm — takes a couple of minutes.

Find it in EasyChair → My Submissions: the number in the # column next to your paper.

Authors

Last name = the surname for the index. Fix any split below — middle names belong in “First”.
